state_types.local_component_state: useState inside the component — for local UI only
state_types.url_state: query params / path segments — for shareable/bookmarkable state
state_types.page_hook_state: useState in use{Domain}Page — owns server data
state_types.application_state: React context / global store — for cross-cutting concerns only

rules.business_transitions: must call services — not direct setState
